hero.headline: *Wallpaper removal* to fresh paint — one crew
hero.subheadline: Rob, Drew, and Brandon show up on time, prep right, and leave your home looking better than you imagined.

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: Interior & Exterior Done Right
services_section.subheading: From prep to final coat — complete painting services

services.title: Interior Painting
services.description: Room by room or whole-house projects. Clean lines, perfect color matching, and zero mess left behind.

services.title: Exterior Painting
services.description: Power washing, careful prep, and weather-resistant finishes that protect your home for years.

services.title: Wallpaper Removal
services.description: Complete wallpaper stripping and surface prep. Ready for fresh paint or new wallcovering.

services.title: Surface Preparation
services.description: Thorough cleaning, sanding, and priming. The foundation of any paint job that lasts.

about.heading: Old-World Craftsmen
about.body: Rob, Drew, and Brandon run every job like it's their own home. Toledo painters who take pride in the details that matter.

reviews.name: Brittany F.
reviews.text: Rob and Andrew painted our dental office perfectly. Consistent, flexible, and worked around our business hours to avoid any disruption. Absolutely recommend them to anyone.

reviews.name: Kim K.
reviews.text: They removed wallpaper and painted our family room and kitchen. Although young, they're old-world craftsmen who take real pride in their work.

reviews.name: Trent P.
reviews.text: Excellent, knowledgeable painters. Thoroughly power-washed and prepped everything. Matched colors perfectly and didn't get stray paint anywhere.

cta.heading: Ready for Fresh Paint?
cta.body: Call Rob for a free estimate. No pressure, just straight talk about your project and honest pricing.
